repair_candidate.summary: Repair #94602 in place so the maintainer-opted Clownfish automerge branch covers the full SSH tunnel port-preflight fix: keep the 127.0.0.1-scoped preferred-port probe, route PortInUseError into the existing ephemeral-port fallback, and add focused regression coverage for both behaviors.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(infra): complete SSH tunnel port preflight repair
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Clownfish repair for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94602.

Summary:
- Keep the SSH tunnel preferred-port preflight scoped to 127.0.0.1.
- Route PortInUseError from the preferred-port probe into the existing ephemeral-port fallback.
- Add focused regression coverage for the occupied preferred-port path.

Context:
- Fixes/continues https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/94596.
- Repairs source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94602 by xzh-xydt.
- Uses https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94607 as related evidence for the missing fallback/test shape; preserve attribution if implementation is reused.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run src/infra/ssh-tunnel.test.ts src/infra/ports.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Repair contributor branch for #94602 by xzh-xydt; preserve author credit on the source PR.
Issue #94596 was reported by wangwllu and should remain linked in the PR body.
If the executor copies or materially ports fallback/test implementation details from #94607, credit wangwllu / wanglu241 and reference #94607 as a source PR in the final PR notes.
#94604 by bowenluo718 independently identified the same host argument fix and remains related evidence, but this job should not close it.
